# OpenVR client ABI source

- Upstream: `https://github.com/ValveSoftware/openvr`
- Tag: `v2.15.6`
- Commit: `0924064316de3effbcd1acf1e309182a2deb1c05`
- Retrieved: 2026-07-15
- `openvr.h` SHA-256: `641EF9791FA8A281C490C85337CB3CBEA8929055CFAD1C78275D26CEF587884F`
- `LICENSE.txt` SHA-256: `9E6D1480FB68E86CEAFED312F7E67DADCDC2A99B350B710D624B8F0F0F1A2329`

The pinned header supplies public OpenVR types and stable client-interface version strings for the
ViewLab-owned legacy runtime boundary. ViewLab does not load an SDK binary or depend on files outside
this repository.
